# displaySizeImage

**Instance Property**

An image of the asset’s contents, appropriately sized for display.

## Declaration

```swift
var displaySizeImage: UIImage? { get }
```

```swift
var displaySizeImage: NSImage? { get }
```

## Discussion

This property does not provide the full-sized image for a photo asset but rather a scaled-down image appropriate for use in a photo editing user interface. To load the full-sized asset image, use the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHContentEditingInput/fullSizeImageURL] property.

## Working with Photo Assets

- **fullSizeImageOrientation**: The Exif display orientation of the full-size image file.
- **fullSizeImageURL**: The URL to a file that contains the full-sized image data.
